title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited:
Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings Advisory Limited!
